globalNews.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
globalNews.summary: BBC News understands the yacht had drifted towards the Admiral Grigorovich, a Russian frigate which has been operating in the Channel.

globalNews.title: Tehran selling deal with US as victory – but for Iranians it was necessity
globalNews.summary: For many Iranians, the question is not whether the deal means victory, but whether it lowers prices and reduces fear of another war.

globalNews.title: Fragile quiet in Lebanon as US-Iran truce leaves unanswered questions
globalNews.summary: Many Lebanese remain doubtful that the agreement could finally mean the end of the fighting between Israel and Hezbollah.

globalNews.title: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
globalNews.summary: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.

globalNews.title: France's oldest female detainee, 79, goes on trial for in-law's grisly murder
globalNews.summary: A dismembered body found in a chain-bound trunk in the Seine in 1995 was only recently connected to the defendant by DNA evidence.

cryptoNews.title: State Street launches GENIUS Act-aligned money market fund for stablecoin reserves
cryptoNews.summary: The launch comes amid growing competition among financial institutions to manage assets backing dollar-pegged stablecoins.

cryptoNews.title: Ripple targets Africa’s booming remittance market with Flutterwave investment
cryptoNews.summary: Ripple’s investment in Flutterwave will bring RLUSD, Ripple Payments and XRPL to one of Africa’s largest fintechs as blockchain remittances gain traction.

cryptoNews.title: Why US-regulated Bitcoin perpetuals could change crypto trading
cryptoNews.summary: US-regulated Bitcoin perpetual futures could give retail and institutional traders new ways to access crypto derivatives.

cryptoNews.title: Binance says it considers EU license compliant amid reports of potential rejection
cryptoNews.summary: Without specifically calling out a report on Binance’s EU license, the crypto exchange warned that any rejection forcing it to delay activities in the region could “weaken liquidity” and present other

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin stocks divergence returns as BTC dips to $66K while oil drops under $78
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin joined oil in heading lower while stocks gained on US-Iran peace momentum, with traders seeing a quick end to the BTC price rebound.

aiNews.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features

aiNews.title: Sixty percent of US consumers say ‘AI’ in brand messaging is a turnoff, survey finds
aiNews.summary: WordPress VIP’s latest survey suggests consumers are wary of AI-generated answers even as companies increasingly view AI search as an important referral channel.

aiNews.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO

aiNews.title: DOJ claims xAI’s unpermitted gas turbines are a matter of ‘national, economic, and energy security’
aiNews.summary: The Justice department says the Pentagon needs xAI to keep using its unpermitted gas turbines.

aiNews.title: Plaud says its software business topped $100M in ARR after shipping over 2M AI notetakers
aiNews.summary: Plaud is trying to make a mark in a crowded market full of AI-powered meeting notetakers.
